allowed_client_workflow: closeout note with limitations and next-step options
claim_boundary: Client Phase 1 registers workflow scope and safety boundaries only. It does not create legal advice, financial advice, binding contract terms, compliance certification, production monitoring, truth validation, or autonomous client action.
no_free_pilot_guardrails: No protected method disclosure in scoping.
No buyer labels surrendered to SpecShift control.
Buyer retains labels and final adjudication.
Pilot must have written scope, boundaries, acceptance criteria, and payment terms.

professional_support_threshold.note: This is a professional-support threshold, not legal advice.
professional_support_threshold.required_action: Engage CPA/legal support before proceeding alone.
professional_support_threshold.trigger: If procurement, paid pilot, contract terms, budget, or money movement becomes real.

prohibited_uses: weapons, targeting, lethal autonomy, kinetic operations, battlefield command, or offensive cyber
client action instructions without human review
purpose: Define the allowed client workflow, prohibited uses, required human review, no-free-pilot guardrails, and professional-support threshold for SpecShift client intake and delivery.
required_human_review: client scope approval before artifact intake
human review before interpreting candidate discrepancies
human review before public-facing or buyer-facing language
human review before delivery package handoff
human review before any procurement, pilot, contract, or money discussion
